metadata.description: Binatrix plugin marketplace for Claude Code — Monday.com, cmux terminal control, Typst PDF generation, CRM architecture, and workflow automation.

plugins.name: monday-com
plugins.description: Manage Monday.com boards, items, columns, groups, automations, and workspaces. Full CRM architecture, column formatting, and API reference.

plugins.name: monday-com-lite
plugins.description: Lightweight Monday.com management plugin. Same coverage as monday-com, ~70% fewer tokens.

plugins.name: cmux
plugins.description: Control cmux terminal multiplexer — workspaces, panes, splits, browser automation, sidebar metadata, notifications, and terminal I/O for AI coding workflows.

plugins.name: typst
plugins.description: Generate PDFs from Typst — primarily CVs / résumés / cover letters via @preview/modern-cv, also presentations (touying) and general documents. Activates on 'make me a resume', 'convert to PDF', 'PDF version', or any Typst-shaped request.
